initial_candidates.sql:
WITH weekly_sales_around_mid_june AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        week_date,
        sales,
        CASE 
            WHEN week_date < date('2018-06-15') THEN 'before'
            ELSE 'after'
        END AS period
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
      AND week_date BETWEEN date('2018-05-18') AND date('2020-07-13')
),
sales_by_period AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        period,
        SUM(sales) AS total_sales
    FROM weekly_sales_around_mid_june
    GROUP BY calendar_year, period
),
sales_comparison AS (
    SELECT 
        b.calendar_year,
        b.total_sales AS sales_before,
        a.total_sales AS sales_after
    FROM sales_by_period b
    JOIN sales_by_period a ON b.calendar_year = a.calendar_year
    WHERE b.period = 'before' AND a.period = 'after'
)
SELECT 
    calendar_year,
    ROUND((sales_after - sales_before) * 100.0 / sales_before, 2) AS percentage_change
FROM sales_comparison
ORDER BY calendar_year;

WITH pre_june15 AS (
  SELECT 
    calendar_year,
    SUM(sales) AS sales_pre
  FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
  WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
    AND week_date BETWEEN date('2018-05-18') AND date('2018-06-14')
  GROUP BY calendar_year
),
post_june15 AS (
  SELECT 
    calendar_year,
    SUM(sales) AS sales_post
  FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
  WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
    AND week_date BETWEEN date('2018-06-15') AND date('2018-07-13')
  GROUP BY calendar_year
)
SELECT 
  p18.calendar_year,
  ROUND((p18.sales_post - p18.sales_pre) * 100.0 / p18.sales_pre, 2) AS pct_change
FROM (
  SELECT 
    COALESCE(pre.calendar_year, post.calendar_year) AS calendar_year,
    pre.sales_pre,
    post.sales_post
  FROM pre_june15 pre
  FULL OUTER JOIN post_june15 post ON pre.calendar_year = post.calendar_year
) p18
ORDER BY p18.calendar_year;

WITH pre_june15 AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        SUM(sales) AS pre_sales
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
      AND week_date BETWEEN date('2018-05-18') AND date('2018-06-14')
    GROUP BY calendar_year
),
post_june15 AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        SUM(sales) AS post_sales
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
      AND week_date BETWEEN date('2018-06-15') AND date('2020-07-13')
    GROUP BY calendar_year
)
SELECT 
    p.calendar_year,
    ROUND((post_sales - pre_sales) * 100.0 / pre_sales, 2) AS percentage_change
FROM pre_june15 p
JOIN post_june15 po ON p.calendar_year = po.calendar_year
ORDER BY p.calendar_year;

WITH sales_periods AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        sales,
        CASE 
            WHEN week_date < date(calendar_year || '-06-15') THEN 'pre_june15'
            ELSE 'post_june15'
        END AS period
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
      AND week_date BETWEEN date('2018-05-18') AND date('2020-07-13')
),
weekly_sales_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        period,
        SUM(sales) AS total_sales
    FROM sales_periods
    GROUP BY calendar_year, period
),
pre_post_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'pre_june15' THEN total_sales END) AS pre_sales,
        MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'post_june15' THEN total_sales END) AS post_sales
    FROM weekly_sales_summary
    GROUP BY calendar_year
)
SELECT 
    calendar_year,
    ROUND((post_sales - pre_sales) * 100.0 / pre_sales, 2) AS percentage_change
FROM pre_post_sales
ORDER BY calendar_year;

WITH pre_june15 AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        SUM(sales) AS pre_sales
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
      AND week_date BETWEEN date('2018-05-18') AND date('2018-06-14')
    GROUP BY calendar_year
),
post_june15 AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        SUM(sales) AS post_sales
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
      AND week_date BETWEEN date('2018-06-15') AND date('2018-07-13')
    GROUP BY calendar_year
)
SELECT 
    p.calendar_year,
    p.pre_sales,
    po.post_sales,
    ROUND((po.post_sales - p.pre_sales) * 100.0 / p.pre_sales, 2) AS pct_change
FROM pre_june15 p
JOIN post_june15 po ON p.calendar_year = po.calendar_year
ORDER BY p.calendar_year;

WITH sales_periods AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        sales,
        CASE 
            WHEN week_date < date(calendar_year || '-06-15') THEN 'pre_june15'
            ELSE 'post_june15'
        END AS period
    FROM cleaned_weekly_sales
    WHERE calendar_year IN (2018, 2019, 2020)
      AND week_date BETWEEN date('2018-05-18') AND date('2020-07-13')
),
weekly_sales_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        period,
        SUM(sales) AS total_sales
    FROM sales_periods
    GROUP BY calendar_year, period
),
pre_post_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'pre_june15' THEN total_sales END) AS pre_sales,
        MAX(CASE WHEN period = 'post_june15' THEN total_sales END) AS post_sales
    FROM weekly_sales_summary
    GROUP BY calendar_year
)
SELECT 
    calendar_year,
    ROUND((post_sales - pre_sales) * 100.0 / pre_sales, 2) AS percentage_change
FROM pre_post_sales
ORDER BY calendar_year;
